action.description: May clinical operations activate the site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the site?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet includes feasibility approval and activation authority.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-MIR-063 activates site S-44 under protocol P6.0 and consent C9 on 2026-06-29.
Feasibility note FEAS-MIR-063 approves site S-44 for startup planning only; it is not enrollment activation authority.
Activation authority AUTH-MIR-063 covers site S-44 and protocol P6.0; consent C9 activation authority remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, and activation date before enrollment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
